name: Graham Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until foamy, not stiff.
2. Add the brown rice syrup and continue to beat until well mixed.
3. Stir in the crushed graham crackers.
4. Drop spoonfuls onto a non-stick baking surface, making about 16-20 mounds.
5. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes.
The cookies will be crisp on the outside and chewy on the inside. Each cookie contains approximately 15 calories, not including the rice syrup or egg whites.
